notes: First-pass internal category taxonomy for routing rules. User-facing copy should stay plain.

categories.label: Consumer billing
categories.description: Billing errors, disputed charges, unexpected fees, or refund problems in a consumer transaction.

categories.label: Retail transaction
categories.description: Problems tied to a purchase, return, delivery, fulfillment, or point-of-sale dispute.

categories.label: Service quality
categories.description: Poor service, failure to perform, or a service outcome that does not match the agreement.

categories.label: Fraud or deception
categories.description: Misleading claims, scams, impersonation, false promises, or deceptive business conduct.

categories.label: Price gouging
categories.description: Unfair emergency-related price increases or abusive emergency market behavior.

categories.label: Privacy or data
categories.description: Unauthorized sharing, exposure, misuse, or poor handling of personal information.

categories.label: Debt collection
categories.description: Collection calls, letters, threats, reporting errors, or unlawful collection conduct.

categories.label: Credit reporting
categories.description: Incorrect credit reporting, failure to correct records, or reporting tied to a dispute.

categories.label: Loan or mortgage
categories.description: Mortgage servicing, lending, auto loan, student loan, or loan-related complaint.

categories.label: Banking issue
categories.description: Problems involving bank accounts, transfers, cards, fees, or consumer banking access.

categories.label: Workplace wages
categories.description: Unpaid wages, overtime disputes, final pay, or related wage problems.

categories.label: Workplace discrimination
categories.description: Discrimination, harassment, retaliation, or unequal treatment in employment.

categories.label: Workplace safety
categories.description: Unsafe work conditions, hazards, and related worker safety complaints.

categories.label: Workplace retaliation
categories.description: Retaliation for reporting hazards, violations, or protected activity at work.

categories.label: Housing condition
categories.description: Serious repair, sanitation, maintenance, or unsafe habitability issues.

categories.label: Housing discrimination
categories.description: Discrimination in renting, buying, financing, advertising, or housing access.

categories.label: Tenant issue
categories.description: Tenant-landlord complaints, lease disputes, access, deposits, or unfair housing conduct.

categories.label: Civil rights
categories.description: Discrimination or rights violations in public life, services, education, housing, or work.

categories.label: Utility issue
categories.description: Billing, shutoff, service quality, or unfair conduct involving utilities.

categories.label: Insurance issue
categories.description: Coverage, denial, billing, claims handling, or policy administration problems.

categories.label: Health or sanitation
categories.description: Food safety, sanitation, public health exposure, or unsafe health conditions.

categories.label: Licensing or professional conduct
categories.description: Unlicensed work, professional misconduct, or complaints tied to regulated trades.

categories.label: Police non-emergency
categories.description: Non-emergency public safety reporting where local law enforcement is relevant.

categories.label: Police misconduct
categories.description: Misconduct, abuse, discrimination, or civil rights violations by law enforcement.
